sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63136" key="liqhlogh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθ-ηλογής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λέγω</foreign> (B) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>) <sense id="n63136.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">built of stones,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.253</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
